records.ety: [L. intensus stretched, tight, p. p. of intendere to stretch: cf. F. intense. See Intend, and cf. Intent, and cf. Intent, a.]

defs: Strained; tightly drawn; kept on the stretch; strict; very close or earnest; as, intense study or application; intense thought.
Vehement; earnest; exceedingly strong; as, intense passion or hate.
Very severe; violent; as, intense pain or anguish.
Deep; strong; brilliant; as, intense color or light.
quotes: In this intense seclusion of the forest.
